progress.basis: Overall % is shipped-plus-in-flight work over the WHOLE project (116/156 tasks done=74%, plus half-credit for in-flight tasks) — archiving old 100%-done tasks off the active list never shrinks this number. Per-track %, remaining hours/sessions below are scoped to the ACTIVE (decluttered) task list only — done=100%, in-progress=50%, pending=0% — so they reflect what's actually still in flight. Of that remaining total, 8 task(s) are GATED on an Omar decision/credential/sign-off (not fleet-executable) — see remaining_hours_gated vs remaining_hours_autonomous. All ESTIMATES; the measured signal is commit velocity (below).
